title: Spec-Driven Development Deep Dive — Part 2: GitHub Spec Kit Practical Guide
description: Get to know the GitHub Spec Kit: a practical toolkit for implementing Spec-Driven Development (SDD) through 9 core instructions, helping you eliminate specification drift in AI coding.
content:
Spec-Driven Development Deep Dive — Part 2: GitHub Spec Kit Practical Guide

GitHub Spec KitIt is an open-source toolkit released by GitHub, designed to provide nine standardized instructions (such as...)./speckit.specify and /speckit.planIt enforces specification-driven development (SDD). By constraining the behavior of large language models (LLMs), it ensures that code implementations are always aligned with business intent, fundamentally eliminating "spec drift".

Series Navigation:

  • Part 1: The Evolution of Software Design and the Essence of SDD
  • Part 2 (This Post): GitHub Spec Kit Practical Guide
  • Part 3: Intent Layer Infrastructure and the Future of SDD
  • Part 4: Building a Simple SDD Workflow Using GitHub Issues


Illustration: GitHub Spec Kit — Encapsulating intent specifications into a highly systematic command-line infrastructure

1. What is a Spec Kit?

GitHub Spec Kit is a specification-driven development (SDD) toolkit released by GitHub in September 2025. It is not a replacement for AI coding assistants, but rather a suite for managing the architecture of constraint components (along with scaffolding and structured templates), supporting integration with core tools such as GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and Cursor for specification-based interface.

Core Concept: The Sole Source of Truth in Change

In traditional workflows, once business development is complete, documentation immediately becomes rusty (i.e., specification drift). Teams tend to treat code as an isolated source of truth.

However, with the help of the Spec Kit,Specifications are directly equivalent to code build recipesWhen you change your mind, simply modify the specification document, and AI will directly recompile and modify the output code according to the drawings, instead of making developers painfully modify mountains of code. This concept leverages powerful AI capabilities.Model Context Protocol (MCP)The idea of ​​breaking down tool silos has a similar underlying principle.

Main suitable scenarios:

  • Greenfield project starting from scratch
  • Modern iterative engineering with highly customized constraints for complex intentions
  • Large and complex ecosystems with rigid multi-user collaboration and avoidance of deviations across terminal systems
术语 (Term) 定义
Spec Kit GitHub 开源的 SDD 工具包，包含一套 Slash Commands 和标准模板。
Spec Drift 规范漂移。代码实现与业务文档随时间产生的不一致现象。
Artifacts 工件。指生命周期中生成的 spec.md、plan.md、tasks.md 等事实依据。

2. GitHub Spec Kit Core Architecture: 5 cores + 4 extensions

exist GitHub Spec KitIn its design, instructions are rigorously divided into...Core Execution Line (Essential Commands) and Enhance quality/collaboration (Optional Commands)Understanding this layering is a prerequisite for the efficient application of SDD.

🚀 Core Execution Line (Essential Commands)

This is the "skeleton" of the SDD process, responsible for the physical generation and phased delivery of the deliverables.

  1. /speckit.constitutionConstitutionalism. Define the project's meta-rules (such as technology stack, coding standards, and quality gates).
  2. /speckit.specifySpecification definition. Capturing signals of business intent (Focus on What).
  3. /speckit.planTechnology planning. Constructing a "digital twin" of the technological logic (Focus on How).
  4. /speckit.tasksTask decomposition. Decouple the plan into atomic execution steps.
  5. /speckit.implement: Implementation. Automatic coding based on the task sheet.

🛡️ Assisting Quality and Collaboration (Optional Commands)

This is the “nervous system” of SDD, ensuring that the intent does not drift during the flow.

  • /speckit.clarify: Clarification of requirements.Independent entry point for human-computer collaborationDevelopers can run it at any time to...specifyAsking follow-up questions and providing additional information does not necessarily depend on the checklist being triggered.
  • /speckit.analyzeConsistency audit./tasksThen run it to scan for conflicts in the entire document chain.
  • /speckit.checklistQuality checklist. As a "unit test for English language requirements," full-phase quality gates are implemented.
  • /speckit.taskstoissuesCollaborative extensions. Primarily used for task synchronization (non-core paths) in GitHub scenarios.

🎨 Expert-level full-phase spiral timing diagram

The core of understanding SDD lies in understandingWorkflow LoopThe process is no longer one-way, but rather...Checklist (Quality Gate)Driven by a spiral ascent mode.

sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as 👤 Human (User)
    participant A as 🧠 AI Agent (Spec-Kit)
    participant F as 📄 Artifacts (文档/产物)
    participant G as 🚀 GitHub (协同层)

    Note over U, F: [阶段 1: Genesis - 立宪]
    U->>A: /speckit.constitution (治理原则)
    A->>F: 写入规则与技术栈约束

    Note over U, F: [阶段 2: Definition - 意图定义]
    U->>A: /speckit.specify (业务规格)
    A->>F: 生成 Spec.md
    
    opt Checkpoint 1: 需求自检 (After Specify)
        U->>A: /speckit.checklist
        A->>F: 扫描 Spec 颗粒度
        A-->>U: C1: 提醒补全 User Story
    end

    rect rgb(240, 248, 255)
    Note right of U: 随时待命的交互入口
    U->>A: /speckit.clarify (人机对齐)
    A->>F: 消除歧义并自动回填 Spec.md
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 3: Design - 技术规划]
    U->>A: /speckit.plan (技术规划)
    A->>F: 生成 Plan.md
    
    opt Checkpoint 2: 反向需求校验 (After Plan)
        U->>A: /speckit.checklist
        A->>F: 交叉对比 Spec & Plan
        alt 发现技术与需求脱节 (Path A/B)
            A-->>U: C2: 警告：实现方案超出了需求定义范围
            U->>A: 回溯修改 Spec 或调用 Clarify
        end
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 4: Engineering - 任务拆解]
    U->>A: /speckit.tasks (任务解耦)
    A->>F: 生成 Tasks.md
    
    opt Checkpoint 3: 执行完整性校验 (After Tasks)
        U->>A: /speckit.checklist
        A->>F: 扫描 Tasks 是否覆盖所有 AC
        A-->>U: C3: 提醒遗漏的边界测试任务
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 5: Audit & Sync - 审计与同步]
    U->>A: /speckit.analyze (三方全产物审计)
    A->>F: 跨文档一致性扫描 (Passes 1-6)
    
    opt 协同扩展
        U->>A: /speckit.taskstoissues
        A->>G: 同步本地 Tasks 至 GitHub Issues
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 6: Execution - 意图落地]
    U->>A: /speckit.implement (自动化编码)
    
    critical Checkpoint 4: 门禁状态机判定
        A->>F: 触发最后扫描：是否有未勾选的 [ ] ?
        option 存在 [ ] 未完成
            A-->>U: 🚨 STOP: 必须处理余下的 Checklist 项
        option 全部 [x] 已完成
            A->>F: 开始编码 (TDD) 并自动回写进度
    end

3. In-depth analysis: The decision-making logic of spiral paths A/B/C

As the whole system"Quality Gate", runchecklistThe final result will determine the physical trajectory of the project:

🔄 Spiral Path A: Backtrack Specification (Discovery → Clarify → Backtrack)

SceneAI isplanTechnical signals (such as caching mechanisms) were extracted at each stage, but it was found that...spec.mdThe specific business failure strategy was omitted.

  • decision making: Back tospecify.use /speckit.clarifyUse it as an entry point for backtracking.
  • actionAI clarifies questions through interactive inquiry → users answer and the system automatically fills in the blanks.spec.md→ Rerun/speckit.planRefresh the solution.
  • philosophy：clarifyNot subordinate tochecklistIt is a dialogue window that is always ready to keep the intention alive.

🔄 Spiral Path B: Refactoring Execution (Risk → Refine)

SceneAI istasksThe phase found that the task description contained weak signal words such as "approximately" or "possibly", or the task granularity was too large to be verified independently.

  • decision makingStaying attasksThe process will be restructured in stages.
  • actionAI re-decomposes atomic tasks based on the checklist until each task item meets the criteria of "independent testing and dependency-free execution".

🔄 Spiral Path C: Quality Release (Validated → Proceed)

SceneThe checklist shows that all acceptance criteria have been quantified, boundaries are clearly defined, and tasks are covered without any blind spots.

  • actionProceed forward to/speckit.analyzePerform a third-party audit (Spec/Plan/Tasks consistency check) → Once no errors are found, proceed to the actual AI automated coding stage.

[!IMPORTANT]
GitHub Spec Kit Hard Constraints: Why/implementWill it be "forced to stop"?
这是 Spec Kit 最硬核的 状态机 (State Machine) 约束。在 implement 的源码逻辑中，AI 会扫描 checklists/ 目录下所有 Markdown 文件的 [ ] 状态。如果尚未全部勾选为 [x]，或者 AI 判定某个关键路径未经过 Clarify，底层脚本会强行锁死代码生成。这迫使每一行生产代码必须有对应的“意图存根”。

4. 最佳实践：专家建议技巧

A. 验收标准必须强制“可度量化与可触发”

  • ❌ 错误做法：“系统保证流畅稳定，不要出错。”
  • ✅ 正确做法：“AC2：API QPS 阈值需应对大于 200，且在超时 1.5s 后触发主动缓存切流。”

B. Bug 出现后的处置逻辑分流

如果代码实施中跑出了错误。该修改代码还是修改文档？

  1. 执行层失败：如果代码逻辑符合 Spec 但因环境或语法微瑕出错，让 Agent 直接提供 Patch。
  2. 逻辑遗漏：坚决拒绝直接修改源码。必须回到顶层，先将遗漏规则写入 spec.md 或 plan.md，从顶部向下重新流转生成，确保 Spec Drift 发生率为零。

What’s Next：SDD 的未来演进

GitHub Spec Kit 提供了一套成熟的企业级意图控制台，通过精密的 9 大指令工作流，真正实现了软件工程由“代码为核心”向“规格为核心”的跨越。这种转变不仅提升了开发效率，更为 AI 代理 (AI Agents) 的深度协作奠定了基础。

而在下一篇文章 Part 3: 意图层基础设施与 SDD 的未来 中，我们将探讨随着 LLM 自管记忆能力的迅猛攀升，SDD 将如何演变为完全自主迭代的新型“自治控制面”。
